title: spermacoce subvulgata
intro: Spermacoce subvulgata, also known as the small white exostema, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Spermacoce subvulgata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe and calm the body.
